title: LND Cobblemon Resource Pack
description: Resource pack official for cobblemon server LND
body:
This pack is only for use on the server LND Cobblemon (Late night Discord) It adds items and models along side base game content. It will not do much while not on LND

Up to date credits can be found in the patch notes

If something in this pack catches your interest, send me a PM on the official discord. While permission isn’t guaranteed, I’m willing to review your request
